headline: Can EMCOR Outgrow Nonresidential Construction Again in 2026?
summary: EME's record backlog, raised 2026 guidance and diverse demand in data centers, healthcare and infrastructure could help it outgrow the market again.

headline: EMCOR Group (EME) Dividend And Index Changes Put Fair Value Back In Focus
summary: Dividend affirmation and index removals put EMCOR Group in focus EMCOR Group (EME) has drawn fresh attention after its board affirmed a regular quarterly dividend of $0.40 per share, shortly after the stock was removed from several Russell value and size indexes. See our latest analysis for EMCOR Group. Recent price action around EMCOR Group reflects that tension, with the stock down 4.4% over the past week and 6.7% over the past month on a share price basis, yet still showing a 20.4% year to...
